title: SieveAction missing Display impl
description: SieveAction is the primary return type of the public evaluate() API and contains user-meaningful strings (folder names, reject reasons, redirect addresses). It derives Debug but has no Display impl. Callers who want to log or present an action to end users must use {:?} (debug format), which includes the enum variant name in Rust syntax rather than a human-readable sentence. Idiomatic Rust: impl fmt::Display for SieveAction so variants like FileInto("Spam") render as something like "fileinto \"Spam\"" — the same pattern used by std::io::Error, which provides both Debug and Display. This matters because the type is #[non_exhaustive] and intended for long-term public API stability; adding Display now avoids a future breaking change.
